title: Remarkably Scalable
description: 1.21.1-26.1.1 | A server mod pack built to improve server performance while scaling well on large servers!
body:
## Introducing Remarkably Scalable!
Remarkably Scalable is a simple, performance-focused mod pack for servers that scales well on larger servers with high player counts. It exclusively includes performance mods, with Vanilla parity being a top priority. Much of the work for this pack is based on my client-side performance pack, [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably), with some configs and mods being the same or only slightly tweaked for servers.

## Installation
You can convert .mrpack files to .zip files with this site: [https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/). Simply place the mods, configs, and server.properties file in the main directory of your server. If you don’t want to replace your server.properties file, just set **sync-chunk-writes=false**.

Pre-loading chunks can significantly improve performance by reducing lag when players explore new areas. To pre-load chunks, set the radius using `/chunky radius 1000`, where 1000 is the number of chunks. Then, run `/chunky start` to begin pre-loading.

## Support or Issues?
If you encounter any issues or need assistance, join my helpful community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/hYkp5vaWZG). Create a post in the support channel, and either a moderator or I will try to help you.

## Other Notes
If you do want to use Remarkably Scalable as a base in your own mod pack, feel free to do so, just make sure to include credit (a link back to this page works).
